name: rideey-discord-bot
description: Route Cash economy Discord bot for Rideey

scripts.migrate: npm run build && node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const { runMigrations, closePool } = require('./dist/database'); (async () => { await runMigrations(); await closePool(); process.exit(0); })().catch((e) => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });"
